popularStory.headline: Senescal de Lenox
popularStory.description: Sir JOHN DRUMOND, *1240 †1373 11° Senescal de Lennox. Envolveu-se em longa disputa jurídica seguida de conflitos por trinta anos até final da contenda em l° de maio de 1360. Perdeu também o privilégio …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Drummond於1318年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾時，他的父親Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox22歲，母親Annabella Graham of Kincardine19歲。他於大約1345年與Mary Margaret Montefichet在蘇格蘭培爾卡吉爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1373年在蘇格蘭培爾卡吉爾享年55歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭斯林史爾音賀馬米音賀馬米 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Drummond于1318年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾时，他的父亲Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox22岁，母亲Annabella Graham of Kincardine19岁。他于大约1345年与Mary Margaret Montefichet在苏格兰培爾卡吉爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1373年在苏格兰培爾卡吉爾享年55岁，埋葬在苏格兰斯林史爾音賀馬米音賀馬米 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Drummond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places, notably the barony of Drummond, which is probably identical with the parish of Drymen (Stirlingshire), named from Gaelic drumainn, a derivative of druim ‘ridge’. It has been said that the principal family of this name are descended from a Hungarian nobleman, Maurice, who accompanied Edgar Atheling and his sister Margaret to Scotland in 1068, where she married King Malcolm III. However, there is disagreement on whether or not this was the case.

English: occasionally perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Dromund (Old Norse Drómundr, apparently from a word denoting a kind of Byzantine galley prevalent till the 12th cent., from Greek dromōn ‘runner’).

variants.name: Drummonds
meanings: Scottish: variant of Drummond , with post-medieval excrescent -s. In Britain this surname is found mainly in County Durham.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Drummond was born in 1318, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, his father, Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox, was 22 and his mother, Annabella Graham of Kincardine, was 19. He married Mary Margaret Montefichet about 1345, in Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1373, in Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 55, and was buried in Inchmahome Priory, Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Drummond est né en 1318, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Annabella Graham of Kincardine, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Mary Margaret Montefichet environ 1345, à Cargill, Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1373, à Cargill, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Inchmahome Priory, Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Drummond 1318 in Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox 22 und seine Mutter Annabella Graham of Kincardine 19. Er hat um 1345 in Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland Mary Margaret Montefichet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1373 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland und wurde in Inchmahome Priory, Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Drummond è nato il nel 1318 nel Aberdeenshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Annabella Graham of Kincardine, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Mary Margaret Montefichet circa 1345, nel Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1373, nel Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Inchmahome Priory, Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: John Drummondが1318年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennoxは22歳，母Annabella Graham of Kincardineは19歳であった。約1345年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアカージルでMary Margaret Montefichetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1373年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアカージルで55歳で死去し，スコットランドスティルリングシュアイアインチマーhオメインチマーhオメ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Hill of Fearn, Ross and Cromarty, Scotla: 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 힐 프 피른

ko.lifeSummary: John Drummond(이)가 1318년 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Annabella Graham of Kincardine(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1345년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 카르길에서 Mary Margaret Montefichet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1373년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 카르길에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 인ch마홈 인ch마홈 플리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Drummond nasceu em 1318, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Annabella Graham of Kincardine, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Margaret Montefichet aproximadamente 1345, em Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1373, em Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Inchmahome Priory, Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Drummond родился в 1318 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Annabella Graham of Kincardine, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Margaret Montefichet около 1345 г. в местности каргилл, пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1373 г. в местности каргилл, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности инчмахом приори, инчмахом, стирлингшир, Шотландия.

Se casó con Mary Margaret Montefichet aproximadamente 1345, en Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1373, en Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Inchmahome Priory, Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland.
